title: Men's March Madness Friday takeaways: How Kentucky, Virginia, Arizona won
content: We're tracking how every first-round game is won -- and keys to each winner's chances of advancing again.

title: UCLA's Close hails Betts's mental health 'courage'
content: A day after UCLA's Lauren Betts opened up about her mental health journey, head coach Cori Close said she couldn't be "more impressed and inspired" by Betts' "courageous vulnerability."

title: Iowa State's Jefferson hurt early vs. Tenn. State
content: All-American forward Joshua Jefferson had to be helped from the floor after appearing to hurt his left ankle against No. 15 seed Tennessee State.

title: Duke 'hopeful' Ngongba can return in 2nd round
content: Duke center Patrick Ngongba II could return from a foot injury for the Blue Devils' second-round game vs. TCU, coach Jon Scheyer said.

title: Trump EO keeps 'national focus' on Army-Navy
content: President Donald Trump has issued an executive order barring the College Football Playoff and other postseason games from airing during the annual Army-Navy matchup in December.

title: Clase, Ortiz put on unpaid non-disciplinary leave
content: As they await trial for an alleged pitch-rigging scheme, Guardians pitchers Emmanuel Clase and Luis Ortiz were transferred to unpaid non-disciplinary leave Friday following an agreement between Major League Baseball and the MLB Players Association.

title: Family of Miller Gardner files wrongful death suit
content: The family of former Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner has filed a wrongful death lawsuit against the Costa Rican resort where their 14-year-old son Miller was found dead of carbon monoxide poisoning last year.

title: Draft daze: Pittsburgh schools go remote for NFL
content: Pittsburgh Public Schools will operate remotely April 22-24 as the city prepares for and hosts the NFL draft.

title: 🏀 Women's tournament: Bracket breakdown
content: ESPN talent cast their votes for which foursome will reach the Final Four. Will Phoenix be full of chalk?

title: 'They're not even close': Why a Giannis trade might be even more complicated this summer
content: As the Giannis trade watch enters another offseason, a rare ownership structure and financial turmoil have left opposing teams wondering: Who's in charge here?

title: Olney: The 7 things I took away from MLB spring training
content: What did you miss at major league camps this spring while watching the World Baseball Classic? Here's what stood out to us from Florida and Arizona.

title: Looking back at Day 1 of men's March Madness
content: Our reporters detail how each game was won Thursday and look ahead to the matchups created for Saturday.

title: Welcome to 'The Reef': LIU's 'fins up' chant has turned a near-empty gym into March magic
content: A few college basketball fanatics were looking for a local team to root for in 2023. They landed on the LIU Sharks -- and turned rooting for them into a passion.

title: Who's your first signing? Most annoying coach? Best city? ESPN's player survey﻿
content: LaLiga players answered ESPN's questions on everything from which one star they would sign for their team to those all-important EA FC player ratings.

title: 'Street dog mentality': Buddy the Dog inspires Queens University men's basketball
content: A hollowed-out replica of a German Shepherd dog has become Queens University's unofficial mascot in its first NCAA tournament.

title: After letting the Super Bowl MVP walk, what's the Seahawks' plan at running back?
content: Kenneth Walker's departure leaves a hole in a backfield already weakened by Zach Charbonnet's injury.

title: Could Cam Jordan be a Chief? Unpacking KC's free agency, and what's next
content: The Chiefs hope their free agent class can make a bigger impact than last year's underwhelming acquisitions.

title: NHL Power Rankings: New 1-32 poll, points pace vs. preseason projections
content: The Sabres have charged into the top three. Plus, how has each team done this season compared to its preseason over/under?

title: NHL playoff watch: Who's winning the Presidents' Trophy?
content: Here's how the race for the top overall seed looks. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings.

title: Serena Williams, Shaq, Tony Hawk among athletes joining viral '90s throwback trend
content: Athletes who had their heydays or debuts in the 1990s got in on the popular meme, set to the Goo Goo Dolls' "Iris."

title: Power Rankings: How did Arsenal drop and Man City rise in ratings of all teams?
content: ESPN's Premier League Power Rankings return to look at all 20 teams: Why did Arsenal drop while Man City replaced them?

title: 10 great signings, six great trades: The NFL free agency moves that Walder graded with an 'A'
content: We've graded more than 60 signings and trades over the past few weeks. But only 16 moves received top marks. We ranked those deals.

title: Yates' draft rankings: Top 50 prospects, plus scouting reports
content: Who are the best players in this year's class? Where do they stand out? Field Yates stacks his top 50 prospects.

title: LeBron in Miami -- where he was at his career best
content: When was LeBron James' peak? There's an argument to be made for 2013, when his Miami Heat did not lose for 52 straight days.

title: Men's tournament: How to bet the Duke, Michigan St. games and more Saturday
content: As you prepare for tipoff, here are our best bets for the second round, plus a pick for the new Eliminator game.

title: Women's tournament: UConn the odds-on title favorite as tourney tips off
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: 2026 NCAA wrestling championships: Schedule, how to watch
content: It's time for the 2026 NCAA wrestling championships! This year crowned the first women's tournament champion. Check out how to watch now.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Mohamed Salah debating Saudi Pro League move
content: Mo Salah is still deciding his future, but a Saudi team is confident it can tempt Liverpool's sporting director to join. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Risers and fallers: Doncic stars, but is it time to drop Giannis?
content: Luka Doncic is on another planet, and Ayo Dosunmu and Daniss Jenkins are on the rise, but should fantasy basketball managers keep Giannis Antetokounmpo and Mikal Bridges rostered?

title: Potential busts to avoid in 2026
content: Who does Tristan H. Cockcroft think will underachieve in 2026? We have the names to steer clear of when drafting your rosters.

title: UK agrees to let US use British bases to strike Iranian missile sites targeting Hormuz
content: Britain has authorized the US to use military bases in the UK for strikes against Iranian missile positions threatening shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. This decision follows a review of the escalating conflict and Iran's disruption of maritime traffic. The move allows US defensive operations to degrade missile sites targeting vessels in the crucial waterway.

title: Iran's F-35 'hit' shakes the myth of US 'sky ghost' - why it could be turning point
content: A US F-35 stealth fighter jet sustained damage during a mission over Iran. The aircraft made an emergency landing safely. Iran claims its air defence systems hit the advanced jet. This incident is under investigation. The F-35 is a highly advanced stealth aircraft. This event could signal improvements in Iran's defence capabilities.

title: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink says AI is leading to a crisis and it is not mass layoffs
content: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink warns that current college graduates may face high unemployment due to rapid AI adoption disrupting entry-level white-collar jobs.  He highlights a societal lag in adapting to technological change, while also noting AI's creation of new opportunities in skilled trades, for which society is unprepared.

title: Airlines vs govt: Centre faces backlash over 60% free seat selection rule, warn of fare hike
content: Airlines like IndiGo, Air India, and SpiceJet are opposing the government's mandate for free seat selection, warning it could inflate airfares. The Federation of Indian Airlines argues this move will force carriers to recoup lost revenue, ultimately burdening all passengers. They emphasize that ancillary revenues are crucial for offsetting rising operational costs in a competitive market.

title: Years after Zuckerberg called it 'the next frontier’ for company, Meta shuts down Horizon worlds
content: Meta is ending its virtual reality social network Horizon Worlds on Quest headsets. The app will be removed from the Quest store by March 2026 and fully discontinued on VR devices by June 2026. Horizon Worlds will then operate solely as a mobile application.

title: Chuck Norris, martial artist and actor, dies at 86
content: Legendary martial artist and 'Walker, Texas Ranger' star Chuck Norris has passed away at 86. His family confirmed his peaceful death in Hawaii after a recent hospitalization. Known for his action roles and martial arts prowess, Norris leaves behind a significant legacy. Tributes are pouring in globally for the beloved icon.

title: Amid Dhurandhar 2 success, Deepika attends concert with Ranveer Singh’s family
content: The highly anticipated 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' is a massive hit, crossing Rs 100 crore. While Ranveer Singh attended the premiere, his wife Deepika Padukone was seen enjoying Rishab Rikhiram Sharma's concert with his family. Fans are speculating about her absence from the film's celebrations, praising her bond with Ranveer's mother and sister.

title: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas says Google Search 'still better job than anyone else'
content: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas revealed his company's Comet browser on iOS defaults to Google Search for everyday queries, acknowledging Google's superiority in navigational searches. This pragmatic approach positions Comet as a complementary tool, blending Google's speed with Perplexity's advanced AI capabilities for more complex needs.

title: From New York to London: How world leaders are celebrating Eid amid global tensions
content: On the most charged Eid in a generation, heads of state, mayors and kings pause to mark the end of Ramadan, each in their own way, each in their own world.

title: 'Dhurandhar : The Revenge': Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 250 crore global mark
content: The Indian box office is witnessing a historic moment as Aditya Dhar and Ranveer Singh’s 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has already surged to a cumulative domestic net of Rs. 165.36 crore by Friday afternoon. Despite an ‘A’ rating and a massive 3-hour 49-minute runtime, the film is on track to cross the Rs. 230 crore global gross mark by the end of Day 2.

title: Jared Goff’s Detroit Lions tied to $156 million Buffalo Bills defensive end
content: The Detroit Lions are projected to acquire Buffalo Bills defensive end Joey Bosa. Analysts suggest Bosa could be an affordable and impactful addition to complement their in-house edge Aidan Hutchinson on the Lions’ defensive line, especially for head coach Dan Campbell. Despite recent performance dips and injury concerns, his veteran presence and disruptive ability are seen as valuable assets for any NFL team, in particular, a team like Detroit. He could be paired with Hutchinson on the gridiron.

title: Piers Morgan wife Celia Walden sleep remark resurfaces as HSTikkyTokky interview turns personal
content: Piers Morgan walked off his show after a heated clash with Harrison Sullivan turned personal. The situation escalated when Sullivan mentioned Celia Walden, leading to Morgan ending the interview. Soon after, Walden’s old 2021 quote asking for her husband to return to work went viral again, adding another layer to the already widely shared moment.

title: Piers Morgan feud explodes as HSTikkyTokky threatens wife’s photo leak unless he apologizes
content: A heated clash between Piers Morgan and influencer Harrison Sullivan has escalated into a personal online feud. Sullivan shared photos of Morgan’s wife, Celia Walden, mocking him and demanding a public apology within 24 hours. He threatened to release more images if ignored. The controversy has sparked backlash, highlighting concerns over privacy, online harassment, and the growing toxicity of viral confrontations.

title: Who will fill Andre Russell's void? KKR head coach Abhishek Nayar reveals
content: Andre Russell's IPL journey with KKR has concluded after he went unsold in the 2026 mini-auction. Head coach Abhishek Nayar expressed confidence in Indian talents Rinku Singh and Ramandeep Singh to fill the void left by the explosive all-rounder. Russell leaves behind a remarkable legacy of match-winning performances for the franchise.

title: 'Things will be little different for Virat': Kohli warned before IPL 2026
content: Irfan Pathan feels Virat Kohli’s shift to fewer formats after retiring from Tests could affect his T20 rhythm, especially after breaks. While Kohli remains in top form, adapting to an aggressive T20 role may be challenging. Pathan also noted Kohli’s attacking approach was key to RCB’s 2025 title and will be crucial again.

title: Horoscope today: Astrological predictions for March 21
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for March 21, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: Raymond MD Gautam Singhania injured in Maldives speedboat accident; 2 Indians missing
content: Raymond Group Chairman Gautam Singhania sustained minor injuries in a speedboat accident in the Maldives. He is recovering in a Mumbai hospital. Two other Indian men, including rally driver Hari Singh, are reported missing, and search operations are ongoing.

title: Candidates: French GM Maxime Vachier-Lagrave doubts R Praggnanandhaa's chances
content: Maxime Vachier-Lagrave ranked R Praggnanandhaa in B tier for the Candidates, calling it a “hot take” based on recent form. Despite strong 2025 performances, he cited six months of inconsistent results, saying, “It’s harsh… Pragg would have been at S tier.” He added, “It’s been 6 months and his form has really not been great.”

title: 'Films made on PM, Indira Gandhi': Rakesh Bedi reacts to Dhurandhar 2 ‘propaganda’ tag
content: Veteran actor Rakesh Bedi, celebrated for his role in 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge', dismisses claims of the film being propaganda. He highlights the movie's immense popularity and calls the audience's response unprecedented. Bedi also shared his elation over the film being discussed by international figures, emphasizing its groundbreaking scale and appeal.

title: 'Cowards': Trump attacks Nato for not joining Iran war, warns US will 'remember'
content: Former President Donald Trump labeled Nato allies "cowards" for refusing to join the US-led military campaign against Iran. He criticized their complaints about high oil prices while not assisting in securing the Strait of Hormuz. Trump warned this lack of support would be detrimental to Nato's future.

title: 'Parks, tourists sites not safe': Iran vows to hunt down US, Israeli officials worldwide
content: Iran's armed forces have issued a severe threat, vowing to hunt down US and Israeli officials globally, even in recreational areas. This warning comes amid ongoing airstrikes from the US and Israel, which Iran claims have weakened its military. The remarks raise concerns about potential militant operations beyond West Asia if the conflict escalates.

title: Paresh Rawal calls RJ stupid over Dhurandhar 2 post, shares RGV review
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' is a box office hit, but a social media spat involving Paresh Rawal has also surfaced. Rawal's sharp retort to RJ Sayema's sarcastic review sparked a debate. Meanwhile, filmmaker Ram Gopal Varma lauded the film as a 'horror' for outdated cinema, praising its realistic hero.

title: IPL 2026: KKR dealt Pathirana blow, availability timeline revealed
content: Kolkata Knight Riders will be without Matheesha Pathirana for the initial phase of IPL 2026 due to a calf strain and ongoing rehabilitation. Head coach Abhishek Nayar confirmed the pacer is expected to be match-fit by mid-April, acknowledging the significant blow to the team.  The franchise is actively evaluating replacement options to fill the void.

title: IPL 2026: Where is RCB bowler Yash Dayal?
content: RCB have begun IPL 2026 preparations, but Yash Dayal’s absence has raised concerns. The bowler hasn’t joined the squad or appeared in team updates, despite being retained. Last seen in the 2025 IPL final, he has been out of action since, with even officials reportedly unable to contact him, leaving his participation uncertain.

title: French Twitch streamer Florian Marliere moves Premiership Rugby to Twitch in France
content: Florian Marliere has bought Premiership Rugby rights in France and will stream matches on Twitch via his Janusport channel. After beIN Sports’ deal ended, fans had no access. Marliere says the move is driven by passion, not profit. His coverage starts with Bath vs Saracens, and it could change how rugby is broadcast in smaller markets.

title: USS Tripoli heads to Iran: Trump eyes occupying Kharg Island, break Iran's grip on Hormuz
content: The US warship USS Tripoli is heading to the Middle East, potentially near Iran's Kharg Island, carrying 2,200 Marines. This deployment amid rising US-Iran tensions highlights the strategic importance of Kharg Island as Iran's primary oil export hub and a key chokepoint in global energy markets.

title: 'CSK don’t benefit from Dhoni': Ex-India teammate's controversial take
content: Irfan Pathan left MS Dhoni out of his CSK XI for IPL 2026, saying his limited lower-order role doesn’t benefit the team. He suggested Sarfaraz Khan at No. 6 instead, unless Dhoni bats more. Pathan’s squad includes new faces, reflecting CSK’s rebuild after poor seasons, with the upcoming campaign crucial for defining Dhoni’s future role.

title: PM Modi speaks with Bahrain King, condemns attacks on infrastructure
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi held a telephonic conversation with Bahrain's King Hamad Bin Isa Al Khalifa, discussing regional developments in West Asia. Both leaders condemned attacks on critical infrastructure, emphasizing the need to keep global shipping routes secure and expressing concern over the impact on food, fuel, and fertilizer security.

title: Trump admin sues Harvard University, seeks recovery of billions
content: The Trump administration has sued Harvard University. The lawsuit alleges the university violated Jewish students' civil rights. This action is part of a broader campaign against the Ivy League school. The government claims Harvard ignored campus hostility and failed to enforce anti-harassment rules. The suit seeks to compel compliance with civil rights law and recover federal funds.

title: Jonathan Brown gives health update from hospital after brain tumour surgery
content: Jonathan Brown is recovering after surgery for a low-grade brain tumour found during a routine scan. He shared a positive update from hospital and asked for time to rest. The former Brisbane Lions captain has received strong support from the AFL community, including Garry Lyon, as fans wait for his full recovery.

title: 'I feel embarrassed': AB de Villiers rips into IPL openers, stat comparison
content: AB de Villiers expressed frustration with IPL batting comparisons, particularly between middle-order players and openers. He argued that openers have a significant advantage due to fielding restrictions and favorable conditions, making their stats unfairly inflated. De Villiers believes this setup is tough on bowlers and even leads to lucky boundaries for batters.

title: Hit for 1st-ball 6, Ravindra Jadeja mocks Yashasvi Jaiswal's ‘no sleep’ claim - Watch
content: Yashasvi Jaiswal stole the show in Rajasthan Royals’ IPL 2026 practice, smashing Ravindra Jadeja for a six off his first ball despite saying he hadn’t slept well. Jadeja’s amused reaction went viral. After a poor 2025 season, RR hope such moments signal a turnaround, with new additions and young talents boosting confidence ahead of the campaign.

title: Jogging app reveals location of French aircraft carrier near Middle East
content: A French officer inadvertently revealed the location of the aircraft carrier Charles de Gaulle by publicly recording a run on the Strava app. The vessel, deployed to the eastern Mediterranean, was reportedly northwest of Cyprus. This incident highlights ongoing security concerns with fitness app data, following similar past exposures.

title: 'Can't have random plans': Where did India go wrong at Women's Asia Cup
content: Former India international Aditi Chauhan calls India’s Asia Cup campaign a mix of promise and reality check, praising emerging talent while highlighting structural flaws. She stresses better preparation, a stronger league and overseas exposure as key to bridging the gap with Asia’s best and turning World Cup qualification from ambition into a realistic goal.

title: India sends 2.5 tons of medical aid to Kabul, slams Pak's 'heinous attack'
content: India has sent a 2.5-ton consignment of medical supplies and equipment to Kabul following a deadly airstrike on a drug rehabilitation center. The shipment aims to support the treatment and recovery of those injured in the March 16 attack, which reportedly killed over 400 people. India reiterated its solidarity with the Afghan people and commitment to humanitarian support.

title: Himachal Pradesh’s growth in 2025-26 pegged at 8.3%, says economic survey
content: According to the survey, the per capita income of Himachal Pradesh is estimated at ₹283,626 in 2025–26, registering a 9.8% growth over the previous year and remaining ₹64,051 higher than the national average

title: Fresh plea claims existence of Jain temple, gurukul at disputed Bhojshala-Kamal Maula mosque site
content: The court has granted two weeks time to the government authorities to file their objections after they raised questions at the maintainability of the plea as a public interest litigation (PIL). The matter has been listed for April 2

title: Mirwaiz ‘barred’ from Friday prayers at Srinagar’s Jamia Masjid
content: Mirwaiz Umar Farooq also posted pictures purportedly showing a large contingent of security forces and police vehicles outside the gate of his residence in Nigeen locality of the city here.

title: Show cause notice illegal, arbitrary, say BJD MLAs who cross-voted in Rajya Sabha poll
content: Political parties can not issue any direction or whip to their members to vote in a particular manner or not to vote at the election, BJD MLAs respond to show-cause notices

title: Delhi HC restores plea on absence of Section 377-like provision in BNS
content: Section 377, after the Supreme Court decriminalised consensual same-sex relations, continued to apply to non-consensual acts, offences involving minors, and bestiality. The BNS replaced the IPC from July 1, 2024

title: Chhattisgarh Assembly passes Bill to curb malpractices in public examinations
content: The Bill prescribed imprisonment of up to 10 years and fines of up to ₹1 crore for specified violations

title: CAPF Bill says IPS officers’ deputation necessary for Union-State coordination, reserves 50% I-G rank posts for IPS
content: The Bill seeks to negate a May 23, 2025 Supreme Court judgment which asked the Home Ministry to “progressively reduce” IPS deputation in CAPFs up to the rank of I-Gs in the next two years

title: Communists fight elections to reflect rights of people, says Brinda Karat
content: She says parliamentary democracy under the Prime Minister Narendra Modi-led government at the Centre has been changed into ‘corporate democracy’

title: A true benevolent authoritarian enforces discipline for the greater good: Seeman
content: Naam Tamilar Katchi chief coordinator Seeman contends that without discipline, there will be no order; he bats for an economy centred on agriculture in T.N. and plans to create government-led industries based on local resources if his party emerges victorious in the Assembly election

title: BJP cadre in Ernakulam irked over Twenty20’s sway in seat allocation
content: Having contested 11 of the 14 Assembly constituencies in Ernakulam in 2021, the party is now likely to be restricted to just three, while the BDJS may have to settle for two, down from three seats last time

title: Congress high command will decide Cabinet reshuffle: Home Minister
content: G. Parameshwara says it is natural to have aspirations, and there is nothing wrong in seeking a ministerial post.

title: Bypolls: BJP ahead in candidate selection, Congress weighs options
content: The bypolls have been necessitated owing to the deaths of incumbent MLAs H.Y. Meti in Bagalkot and Shamanur Shivashankarappa in Davangere; both served as Ministers during Siddaramaiah’s previous tenure as Chief Minister

title: UNI office sealed in Delhi; staffers allege manhandling by the police
content: An order issued by the Land and Development Office, pursuant to a court judgment, had asked the United News of India agency to vacate the premises

title: SC says people have a right to criticise its judgments
content: The Chief Justice said that the textbook edition in question had also balanced criticism by highlighting meaningful interventions made by the apex court in the past

title: Lok Ayukta orders Kerala govt. to rehabilitate families displaced for Veli tourist village
content: The panel directs the State government to file an Action Taken Report on September 3, when it again considers the case.

title: Kerala’s fisherfolk hope to be heard this election season
content: Their wish list includes government-backed price fixing mechanism to ensure fair returns, stringent enforcement of rules, optimum use of available Central assistance, better rehabilitation schemes and student scholarships

title: Assembly elections 2026 updates: Mamata releases TMC manifesto, claims 'unofficial President's Rule' imposed in poll-bound Bengal
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma files nomination from Assam's Jalukbari constituency; Mr. Sarma laid down his objective for Assam, centred around the identity and development of Assam

title: Himachal govt. intends to invest ₹3,000 crore in tourism; Chief Minister woos industry
content: During CII conference, Mr. Sukhu assured that harassment of industrialists would not be tolerated and their grievances could be brought directly to his notice; he adds that all clearances for industries should be provided at one place and the Industries department should actively facilitate investors

title: Unseasonal rains: Agriculture Ministry reviews situation, assesses farm losses
content: The Ministry discussed the immediate needs of farmers, the process of insurance claims, and the functioning of relief mechanisms

title: Mamata makes 10 commitments to woo West Bengal voters
content: Trinamool Congress manifesto highlights cash incentives like Lakshmir Bhandra and Yuva Saathi; makes fresh promises on healthcare, education infrastructure, support for landless farmers

title: Suvendu Adhikari accuses Mamata of poll code violation, demands EC action
content: The BJP leader alleged that Mamata Banerjee has violated the poll code by using the Chief Minister's letterhead for political correspondence

title: PM Modi speaks to King of Bahrain; condemns attacks on energy infra in West Asia
content: During his telephonic conversation with the King of Bahrain, the prime minister reiterated the importance of ensuring freedom of navigation and keeping shipping lines open and secure

title: Indian killed in Saudi Arabia after Iranian missile debris hit
content: War’s second Indian fatality in Saudi Arabia after one person who died on March 8; Indian embassy in Riyadh advises 26 lakh Indians in the kingdom to ‘stay vigilant, strictly adhere to safety guidelines’

title: West Asia war unravels Kashmir-Iran carpet connection
content: Kashmir has been competing with Iranian carpets for centuries, replicating unique designs associated with cities like Kermanshah, Kashan, Tabriz, Khorasan, Isfahan, Hamadan, Ardabil, Mashhad, Qum and Shiraz.

title: Price of premium petrol up ₹2 per litre, government says no impact on common man
content: Premium petrol only 5% of sales, says IndianOil; Congress slams government for increasing prices when people are “troubled by the gas shortage”; India’s crude oil basket is at $117.09 for every barrel this month

title: West Bengal’s two-cornered contest is one between continuity and change
content: While the Trinamool Congress, which is battling an anti-incumbency of 15 years, is banking on cash incentive schemes and Bengali identity, the BJP wants to unseat Mamata Banerjee on grounds of alleged demographic change and corruption in the State

title: Will G. Sudhakaran throw a spanner in the Left’s electoral prospects?
content: If the veteran communist leader’s grassroots connect gels with UDF’s electoral machinery, the contest in Ambalappuzha could be turned on its head. By framing his Independent candidature as an effort to uphold ‘communist values,’ he seeks to position himself within an ideological continuum, while tapping into ‘disillusionment among genuine cadres’

title: ‘Lethargic’ officials who left Chambal sanctuary to the mercy of sand miners will be held liable: SC
content: Bench tells Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh and Uttar Pradesh, in whose tri-junction the sanctuary is located, that every act of destruction of wildlife habitat will attract offences and penalties under multiple laws

title: Work on inlet side of SLBC tunnel resumes after a gap of about 13 months
content: Minister for Irrigation N. Uttam Kumar Reddy said the target is to complete the tunnel by 2027-end and commission the project by June 2028

title: NICE opens 1.5-km link road near Deepanjali Nagar in Bengaluru
content: The newly constructed four-lane stretch directly links Deepanjali Nagar junction (BHEL Circle) to NICE Road near Hosakerehalli PES College, and is expected to ease traffic flow towards Challaghatta and adjoining areas

title: Job calendar a big let down for unemployed youth in A.P., says DYFI
content: It demands that the job calendar be revised, with at least 1 lakh posts, and the upper age limit for the aspirants be increased to 47 years

title: People stop cars to shoot videos of an accident, not help the dying on the road, says CJI
content: The Supreme Court was hearing a plea on the police stigmatising accused through social media handles, parading them in handcuffs and ropes

title: As per provision, Nitish Kumar can remain CM for next six months: Bihar Minister Sharwan Kumar
content: The statement has come with BJP leaders of Bihar awaiting a new Chief Minister from the party after Nitish Kumar’s Rajya Sabha win

title: Israel Says It Killed Intelligence Head Of Iran's Basij Force
content: Israel said Friday it had "eliminated" the intelligence chief of Iran's Basij paramilitary force in a previous strike that also killed the force's top commander.

title: Trump Says He Doesn't Want Ceasefire In Iran
content: US President Donald Trump on Friday ruled out reaching a ceasefire agreement with Iran, saying Washington has the upper hand in the three-week-old war.

title: Mojtaba Khamenei Says Iran Dealt Enemies "Dizzying Blow"
content: Iranians have "dealt him (the enemy) a dizzying blow so that he now starts uttering contradictory words and nonsense," Khamenei said.

title: US Could "Take Out" Iran's Kharg Island Any Time: White House
content: Axios reported that Trump was mulling an operation against Kharg to pressure the Islamic republic to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Israel-Iran War LIVE: UK Allows US To Use Its Bases To Hit Iran Sites Targeting Ships
content: US Israel Iran War News LIVE Updates: Iran has been striking its Persian Gulf neighbours' energy facilities since the war started on February 28, and has made the Strait of Hormuz shipping channel, nearly impassable.

title: UK Approves US Using Its Bases To Strike Iran Sites Targeting Ships
content: British ministers met on Friday to discuss the Iran war and Iran's blocking of the Strait of Hormuz, according to a Downing Street statement.

title: Just 5 Votes: Rajya Sabha Poll Math Puts Congress On Edge In Madhya Pradesh
content: With three Rajya Sabha seats from the state set to fall vacant and elections expected in April-May, the battle will hinge on numbers.

title: Iran Warns Parks, Tourism Areas "No Longer Safe" For Tehran's Enemies
content: Iran fired on Israel and energy sites in neighboring Gulf Arab states as many in the region marked one of the holiest days on the Muslim calendar.

title: "Hostile Environment": Team Trump Sues Harvard Over Anti-Israeli Protests
content: Harvard has been a central focus of the president's campaign to force changes at major US universities, which Donald Trump has derided for alleged antisemitic and "radical left" ideologies

title: Ranchi Man Dies On Ship Near Hormuz, Family Seeks Help To Bring Back Body
content: Captain Rakesh Ranjan died on board a merchant vessel carrying oil near the Strait of Hormuz, his family said on Friday, urging the Centre and the Jharkhand government to help bring back his body.

title: Maharashtra Women's Panel Head Quits After Row Over Ties With 'Rapist' Astrologer
content: Ashok Kharat was arrested in Nashik on Wednesday for allegedly raping a 35-year-old woman several times over three years

title: Proposed Footpath Policy Aims To Reclaim Pedestrian Spaces In Bengaluru
content: DK Shivakumar said the government is committed to safeguarding footpaths, which have increasingly been encroached upon by street vendors, causing inconvenience to pedestrians and contributing to traffic congestion.

title: "Same Script, Different Stage": Iran Invokes Vietnam War In US Critique
content: Seyed Abbas Araghchi, writing on his official X account, claimed American officials had once sought to project confidence even as the Vietnam War turned against them.

title: Eid al-Fitr 2026 Live: Celebrations In Saudi Arabia, UAE Dampened By Iran War
content: Eid ul-Fitr 2026 Live Updates: The celebrations in the Middle Eastern nations will remain low-key due to the ongoing Iran war.

title: Video: Leopard Sparks Panic In Mumbai, Scales School Wall And Attacks Dog

title: US Defence Secretary Uses Biblical Language To Justify US Strikes On Iran

title: Every person with a phone today is media, a threat to free trial: SC
content: a bench of cJI Surya Kant, justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul M Pancholi alleged that police upload videos and photographs of arrested accused on their social media handles . the bench agreed with senior advocate Gopal Sankaranarayanan that "every person with a mobile has become media" the bench said that when there is an accident, people take out their mobile phones to create content even when a person is bleeding on the road .

title: How Chuck Norris Facts gave birth to the modern meme
content: the sports world was heartbroken to find out that Chuck Norris died on friday . this story was originally published on august 23, 2023 . it was the internet equivalent of Marie Curie discovering radium, or Thomas Edison inventing the telegraph.

title: Why DC coach expects Defenders to get every team's best shot
content: Shannon Harris was named interim head coach of the DC Defenders . "stay away from the rat poison," Harris says . he says the attention to detail in the preseason has been what he's wanted . the defenses have a lot of new guys on our team, but the culture is set," Harris said .

title: How did Tottenham go from Europa League champs to a very real relegation battle?
content: the champions league anthem was played at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Wednesday . atletico madrid were in town, and Spurs were playing in football's premier club competition with the prize of a quarterfinal against Barcelona at stake . despite a 3-2 second-leg victory for Igor Tudor's team, Spurs suffered a 7-5 aggregate defeat .

title: NBA debut to March Madness: Sandfort surprises brother in Nebraska win
content: payton Sandfort caught a 3 a.m. taxi and a flight to surprise his younger brother . he made his first NBA debut in the Thunder's 121-92 win against the Brooklyn Nets . his brother, a junior forward who signed a two-way contract with the Thunder earlier this month, was on his home court .

title: Women's March Madness Day 1 takeaways: Scores, analysis, recaps
content: the first round of the 2026 women's NCAA tournament is underway as teams look to advance in the bracket . we're tracking how every team won Friday, from upsets, blowouts and big performances . the only game in which the Terrapins scored more points was a double-overtime win over Minnesota .

title: Women's March Madness live tracker: Updates from Friday's first round
content: we're tracking all 16 games from Austin, Texas, to Norman, Oklahoma . follow along as our reporters track all the live action throughout day 1 . the first round of the 2026 women's NCAA tournament starts today .

title: Men's March Madness live tracker: Updates from Friday's first round
content: The first day of the 2026 NCAA men's basketball tournament  set a high bar . The  11-seeded VCU Rams  and  12-seeded High Point Panthers  delivered the first upsets of March Madness.  AJ Dybantsa  scored the most points (35) by a freshman in an NCAA tournament debut in BYU's loss to Texas. And more points rained in with Michigan, Illinois and Saint Louis each eclipsing the 100-point mark Thursday. The action doesn't slow down Friday with games underway and more still to tip (all times Eastern): (9) Iowa vs. (8) Clemson:  6:50 p.m. (12) Northern Iowa vs. (5) St. John's:  7:10 p.m. (10) UCF vs. (7) UCLA:  7:25 p.m. (15) Queens vs. (2) Purdue:  7:35 p.m. (16) Prairie View A&M vs. (1) Florida:  9:25 p.m. (13) California Baptist vs. (4) Kansas:  9:45 p.m. (15) Furman vs. (2) UConn:  10 p.m. (10) Missouri vs. (7) Miami:  10:10 p.m. ESPN's reporters are on-site across the country, tracking the biggest highlights in real time.

title: In bid to reset ties, B'desh envoy calls on Jaishanakar, Piyush Goyal
content: the high commissioner says he affirmed Bangladesh's readiness to walk, work with India . he also calls on commerce and industry minister Piyush Goyal . hamidullah was appointed high commissioner in April last year .

title: Sources: 49ers pass on Williams option, eye deal
content: the 49ers ' are not exercising the $10 million option bonus on Trent Williams' contract . the team is not overly concerned about it, sources tell ESPN's Adam Schefter . Williams' salary cap number now will grow to close to $47 million, sources say .

title: 'The best is still yet to come': Why Wyatt Langford is an AL MVP sleeper pick
content: Wyatt Langford landed at no. 4 on the top 100 prospects list of ESPN's Kiley McDaniel . a couple of years ago, he broke camp with the defending champions as their every-day left fielder . the outfielder had spent just 44 games in the minor leagues at that point .

title: EC constitutes 19 appellate tribunals to hear SIR cases
content: Bharti Jain is senior editor with The Times of India, New Delhi. She has been writing on security matters since 1996. Having covered the Union home ministry, security agencies, Election Commission and the ‘prime’ political beat, the Congress, for The Economic Times all these years, she moved to TOI in August 2012. Her repertoire of news stories delves into the whole gamut of issues related to terrorism and internal strife, besides probing strategic affairs in India’s neighbourhood. Read More
